In the Gallery

And all these masks over here are the work of a single artist - as you can see he has a fondness for black and red:

Here on the right is a famous work - 'Tamburlaine', where on the tips of bright spears
perch 100 furies - they are waiting for the signal.

This one is said to be the artist's favourite - the faces are familiar, prototypes:
he's called it pseudomimesis - self-propagating people

And the title of this exhibition? Surely to title it is to complete it,
And as the artist says: The universe is always dreaming itself into being.

1990

writing
